## 📝 Description

Rebrands the Docusaurus site for IVA projects, adds WordPress/RagTool/Orchestrator doc sections, and introduces repo hygiene improvements (homepage tweaks + PR template).

## 🎯 What does this PR do?

- [x] Feature addition
- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Other: _ _

## 🔍 Changes Made

- Registered standalone docs plugins + navbar links for `wordpress-site`, `ragtool`, and `orchestrator`, including placeholder guides so links resolve.
- Updated global branding (logo, favicon), restructured the navbar, and refreshed the homepage hero/features to highlight the three IVA projects.
- Added a reusable pull-request template and filled it out with this PR body.

No special deployment steps. The generated `build/` output already reflects the new sections; deploy as usual once merged.
